scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/@capacitor-community/apple-sign-in/Package.swift';let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');c=c.replace('from: \"7.0.0\"','from: \"8.0.0\"');fs.writeFileSync(p,c);console.log('Patched apple-sign-in Package.swift for Capacitor 8');" && node scripts/patch-package-swift.js
scripts.sync:ios: npx cap sync ios && node scripts/patch-package-swift.js && node scripts/patch-capacitor-config.js
